description_long: This is a single-story residential house with a simple rectangular footprint, surrounded by a white picket fence and a concrete driveway leading to the main entrance. The house features a medium-pitched gable roof with reddish-brown shingles and light gray exterior walls. Several windows are symmetrically placed on each visible side, and the main entryway is accessible from the driveway, partially obscured by a large leafy tree. The property includes a small yard with a mix of mature and young trees, as well as some low shrubs near the fence. The overall design is modest and functional, typical of suburban neighborhoods. The house appears to be constructed primarily from concrete or stucco, with wooden or composite window frames and roofing materials.
description: A single-story suburban house with a gable roof, light gray walls, and a white picket fence, surrounded by trees and shrubs.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, concrete driveway, and two large trees partially obscuring the house.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the length of the house, the gable roof, and the fenced yard with shrubs and trees.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the house, more windows, and the continuation of the white picket fence.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with a clear look at the driveway, entryway, and the arrangement of trees and fence.
attribute_entryway_design: Simple front door accessed by a concrete driveway, partially sheltered by trees, with no visible porch or decorative columns.
